7694.one_line_summary: Cross-chain storage router protocol extension for Solana blockchain storage operations.
7694.notes: Extends EIP-7700 with Solana-specific storage routing; includes EVM-SVM type casting guidance.

7695.one_line_summary: Ownership delegation and context management for ERC-721 tokens without transfer.
7695.notes: Enables delegation of temporary ownership and contextual use while preserving primary owner rights; supports rental, mortgage, BNPL use cases.

7699.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension adding transfer reference fields for payment reconciliation.
7699.notes: Enables association of transactions with orders/invoices via optional reference parameter; compatible with existing ERC-20.

7700.one_line_summary: Cross-chain storage router protocol for L1/L2/database storage operations via revert events.
7700.notes: CCIP-Store specification; defines StorageRoutedToL1/L2/Database routers with deterministic key generation for database storage.

7710.one_line_summary: Standard delegation interface for smart contracts to grant capabilities to other contracts or EOAs.
7710.notes: Enables long-lived sessions and bounded permissions via single signature; compatible with ERC-4337 and modular smart accounts.

7715.one_line_summary: wallet_requestExecutionPermissions RPC method for DApps to request scoped transaction permissions.
7715.notes: Enables permissions without repeated signatures and off-chain transaction execution; integrates with ERC-7710 delegation.

7720.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension for time-locked token transfers with deferred withdrawal capability.
7720.notes: Enables vesting, escrow, and timed reward scenarios with unique deposit IDs tracking unlock times.

7721.one_line_summary: Lockable extension for ERC-1155 enabling transfer restrictions while preserving utility.
7721.notes: Supports NFT collateral lending, rental, BNPL without escrow transfer; lock/unlock mechanisms with locker designation.

7722.one_line_summary: Privacy-preserving opaque token using hashed baskets to conceal on-chain balance information.
7722.notes: Uses keccak256(salt, tokenId, value) baskets with oracle-verified reorganization; off-chain storage model for DeFi compliance.

7726.one_line_summary: Standard oracle interface for asset value quotes using explicit token amounts.
7726.notes: getQuote(baseAmount, base, quote) pattern preferred over price factors for security; addresses ETH/BTC/ISO4217 currencies.

7729.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension adding metadata() URI function for token image and description.
7729.notes: Enables memecoins and visual metadata display; backward compatible with existing ERC-20 tokens.

7730.one_line_summary: JSON schema for clear-signing structured data with human-readable intent and field formatting.
7730.notes: Enables wallet clear-signing for contracts and EIP-712 messages; supports encryption schemes like FHE; addresses phishing risks.

7734.one_line_summary: Minimalist decentralized identity verification using cryptographic hashes for privacy.
7734.notes: createIdentity/verifyIdentity/revokeIdentity pattern; off-chain identity details; events for transparency.

7738.one_line_summary: Permissionless registry for associating executable scripts with smart contracts.
7738.notes: Allows scripts for contracts without ERC-5169 interface; multichain singleton pattern; owner scripts prioritized.

7739.one_line_summary: Defensive rehashing scheme for ERC-1271 to prevent signature replay across smart accounts.
7739.notes: TypedDataSign and PersonalSign workflows; preserves readable nested EIP-712 structures; prevents cross-account replay.
